data.title: Multifactor Authentication
data.description: Instagram supports multifactor authentication to enhance account security.
data.technical_spec: Requires additional verification, such as a text message code or authenticator app.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages and interactions on Instagram are protected by encryption techniques.
data.technical_spec: Encryption ensures that only the communicating users can read messages.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Instagram performs regular audits to detect and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Involves code review, penetration testing, and vulnerability assessments.

data.title: Anomaly Detection Systems
data.description: Automated systems are in place to detect unusual patterns of behavior indicating potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms analyze user behavior to identify anomalies.

data.title: Security Community Program
data.description: Instagram encourages and rewards security researchers for identifying potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Bug bounty programs provide incentives for responsible disclosure of security issues.
